title: Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited:
Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited!
